defs: The act of flowing together; the meeting or junction of two or more streams; the place of meeting.
quotes: New York stood at the confluence of two rivers.

defs: Any running together of separate streams or currents; the act of meeting and crowding in a place; hence, a crowd; a concourse; an assemblage.
quotes: You see this confluence, this great flood of vistors.
The confluence . . . of all true joys.
